actions.value: If you believe that your coins have been stolen by an attacker, we can refer you to a blockchain forensic analyst that specializes in tracing stolen funds. They will do a free consultation with you to share more about how they work, and what options you have, given your specific circumstances. The chances of recovering stolen crypto are generally low, but I would encourage you start conversation with them if you'd like to pursue these coins -- https://coinstructive.com/investigations/
